data.body: Realigned to the SHIPPED workflow engine (epic e6d9, CLOSED: src/rebar/llm/workflow/ — declarative IR + interpreter/executor + run_workflow CLI/MCP + PydanticAI runner) and the SHIPPED contract-bearing prompt model (epic da27, closed this session: src/rebar/llm/prompts.py — front-matter inputs/outputs contracts, execution_mode, derived index, .rebar/prompts override). 'Reuse rebar.llm extension points' is now concrete machinery. The residual open dependency is 6f2d (gate-as-workflow shape + LLM-functionality unification), still OPEN. See epic 5fd2 prerequisite-foundations update.
